race.comment: SUPER SUNNY SEEYA (2) has been thereabouts lately without being able to break through, the latest effort a third at this track over 1200m. Looks all set to grab that well-deserved win. HARBOURING (1) didn't make an impact at his last run before going for a spell on August 2. Has won first-up before and is the definition of a course specialist. Just has the sticky draw to overcome. THE LAST STAND (3) never looked likely last start when settling a long way off them but did pass tiring runners to finish midfield. His run here prior was full of merit when beaten a long neck. Rates highly on best. SHA NA NA (6) next best.
